title: Saudi Cold Chain Monitoring Platform
entry_mechanism: Saudi software company developing cold chain IoT platform anchored by SFDA cold chain compliance requirements
executive_summary:
Cold chain logistics — the temperature-controlled movement of pharmaceuticals, vaccines, food, and biological samples — is a critical national infrastructure requirement that Saudi Arabia has historically managed poorly. Vaccine wastage due to cold chain breaks, pharmaceutical recall events, and food safety failures all trace to inadequate cold chain monitoring. Saudi Arabia's SFDA now requires temperature monitoring data for pharmaceutical imports and distribution — creating a regulatory pull for cold chain technology.

Node LG-1 targets a Saudi-developed cold chain monitoring platform: IoT sensors, data management, alert systems, and regulatory compliance reporting for Saudi Arabia's pharmaceutical and food cold chains. The platform combines hardware (temperature loggers, cellular trackers) with software (dashboard, alerts, SFDA reporting) in a SaaS model sold to Saudi distributors, hospitals, and food companies.

The global cold chain monitoring market was valued at $7.8 billion in 2024 growing at 19.3% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's pharmaceutical import volume ($6+ billion annually) and food retail sector create a substantial domestic market. SFDA's compliance requirement is the regulatory anchor that guarantees market creation.

companies.name: Sensitech (Carrier)
companies.rationale: Sensitech is the global cold chain monitoring leader. Technology licensing for Saudi-developed platform.

companies.name: ORBCOMM
companies.rationale: ORBCOMM provides cold chain IoT with cellular and satellite connectivity. Saudi platform development on ORBCOMM infrastructure.

companies.name: Emerson (Cargo Solutions)
companies.rationale: Emerson produces cold chain monitoring hardware with established Gulf logistics relationships.

companies.name: Testo
companies.rationale: Testo produces precision temperature monitoring devices with SFDA-compatible data formats.

companies.name: Controlant
companies.rationale: Controlant specialises in pharmaceutical cold chain monitoring and has WHO pre-qualification for vaccine cold chain.

partners.name: SFDA (Saudi Food and Drug Authority)
partners.current: Pharmaceutical cold chain regulation; import inspection
partners.upgrade: SFDA mandatory cold chain data reporting requirement; Saudi cold chain platform as SFDA certified reporting tool; SFDA-Saudi platform integration for regulatory compliance

partners.name: NUPCO / Saudi pharmaceutical distributors
partners.current: National pharmaceutical distribution; some cold chain monitoring
partners.upgrade: NUPCO as anchor customer; Saudi platform deployed across NUPCO cold chain; NUPCO operational data as development input

partners.name: Saudi Post / SPL (Saudi Post Logistics)
partners.current: National logistics network; some temperature-controlled courier
partners.upgrade: SPL pharmaceutical cold chain service; Saudi platform integration for last-mile pharma delivery; Saudi cold chain network expansion

partners.name: SDAIA
partners.upgrade: Saudi IoT cold chain data standard; SFDA-SDAIA cold chain data sovereignty framework; API standards for cold chain reporting
